description: A photograph depicting an agricultural field, likely a fruit tree plantation, with visible rows of young trees. A dirt track runs diagonally from the bottom left towards the middle right foreground. The ground, especially near the track, appears muddy or wet. In the background, a dense line of mature trees is visible, along with a metal structure resembling a power line pylon on the left side. The image illustrates typical characteristics of "fruit trees and berry plantations" as defined in the surrounding document text for Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) land cover classification.
